texto: People sometimes imagine that without desire there would be no enjoyment. The opposite is true. When you're caught up in craving, you never really enjoy anything very much because your mind is always pulling you on to the next desire and the next after that. When you let go of desire, then you're free to enjoy whatever is right in front of you.
explicacao: Citação de Lorne Ladner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “People sometimes imagine that without desire there would be no enjoyment. The opposite is true.
